prompt: A premium dark-themed wellness platform dashboard. Clean SaaS layout with sidebar navigation, analytics cards showing user engagement metrics, a progress chart, and a daily wellness score widget. Subtle blue accent. Rounded corners, soft shadows, modern sans-serif typography.

A dark-themed mobile onboarding flow for a wellness app. Step indicator step 2 of 4, a question about wellness goals with selectable pill-shaped options. Soft blue accents, generous whitespace, modern and calm.

A dark-themed custom video player UI for a wellness education platform. Paused meditation video with large centered play button, progress bar, chapter markers, lesson title overlay. Minimal chrome. Blue accent.

A premium dark-themed streaming video player interface. Paused animated movie frame with transport controls, timeline scrubber, volume, subtitles toggle, fullscreen button. Sleek minimal chrome. Warm amber gold accent.

A dark-themed accessibility audit annotation screen. UI component with colored overlay markers for contrast ratios, focus order numbers, ARIA label callouts. Sidebar with WCAG checklist. Professional UX tool aesthetic. Amber accent.
A dark-themed AI prompt engineering interface. Split view: left text prompt input with parameters, right side generated image preview. Terminal aesthetic mixed with modern UI. Teal cyan accent.
A dark-themed gallery view of AI-generated visual outputs. Grid of 6 images with metadata below each. One selected with teal border. Clean tool-like interface.

A dark-themed creative campaign dashboard. Brand campaign overview with hero image preview, color palette swatches, typography specimens, social media asset thumbnails. Warm orange accent. Agency studio aesthetic.
A dark-themed motion design tool interface. Timeline editor with keyframe diamonds, canvas with animated UI transition mid-frame, properties panel with easing curves. Neutral gray accent.
A dark-themed design tool canvas showing a user flow diagram. Connected screens with arrows, checkout flow. Minimap in corner, layers panel visible. Clean vector aesthetic. Purple accent.
A dark-themed design system component library. Grid of UI components: buttons, input fields, toggles, dropdowns, tags, color tokens. Clean documentation layout. Blue accent. Ultra-wide aspect ratio.
Small dark-themed preview showing a streaming platform with movie poster grid. Compact thumbnail. Amber gold accent.
Small dark-themed preview showing a wellness dashboard with circular progress ring and stat cards. Compact thumbnail. Blue accent.
Small dark-themed preview of generative art output. Abstract geometric shapes with glowing teal edges on black background. Creative coding aesthetic. Compact.
Tall narrow dark abstract composition. Layered geometric shapes with warm orange glow, subtle noise texture, depth. Fragment of a design system. Atmospheric moody portrait orientation.
Small dark abstract design fragment. Portion of a Figma artboard with layered rectangles, subtle grid, vector paths. Zoomed-in crop of a designer workspace. Minimal quiet.
